releaseNotes: App Icon Badges: A red notification badge now appears on your app icon for trophy alerts, updates, and reminders!
Badge Customization: Fully customize which notifications trigger the app icon badge in your Settings.
Dynamic Urgency: The app icon badge now increases in count after 10:00 PM if you haven't finished your daily challenge.
Emergency Sound Fix: Improved reliability for trophy degradation sounds to ensure you never miss a warning.
Performance Improvements: Faster data syncing and smoother transitions between app screens.
